_notes: Source: hemas-immunization (hospital). Target: US Core Immunization. Source mandates encounter, constrains performer to max=1 and actor to hemas/Practitioner, and has hospital-specific extensions. Target adds statusReason MS, tightens vaccineCode binding (CVX extensible), constrains patient to us-core-patient, adds primarySource MS, and removes encounter constraint. Different extension sets.

drifts.description: New warning constraint added in target: us-core-5 (warning: SHOULD have a translation to the NDC value set). Source has no root-level constraints.
Optional extension vaccineProgram[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension administeredBy[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Source extension slicing removed in target: source defines slices [vaccineProgram, administeredBy]; US Core Immunization has no extension slicing.
statusReason MustSupport added in target (US Core mustSupport=true example:immunization-status-reason); source does not constrain statusReason. MS added on optional element.

vaccineCode binding changed: source has no binding (inherits R4 base example:vaccine-code); target adds extensible(http://cts.nlm.nih.gov/fhir/ValueSet/2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1010.6) CVX value set. New extensible binding added; source had example binding from R4 base.
patient reference target changed: source constrains to hemas/Patient; target constrains to us-core-patient. Different profile targets.

encounter cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed from required element: source [1..1 mustSupport=true →hemas/Encounter] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (US Core does not constrain encounter at all). Min decreased and MS removed.

occurrence[x] types in target explicitly declared as [dateTime, string] (mustSupport=true); source inherits R4 base [dateTime, string mustSupport=false] without explicit type constraint. MustSupport added.
primarySource MustSupport added in target (US Core mustSupport=true); source does not constrain primarySource. MS added on optional element.
performer max cardinality relaxed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (US Core does not constrain performer at the backbone level). Max increased and MS removed.

performer.actor reference target widened and MustSupport removed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true →hemas/Practitioner]; US Core does not constrain performer.actor (inherits R4 base generic Reference). Target widened; MS removed.
lotNumber MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain lotNumber. MS removed from optional element.
site MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain site. MS removed from optional element.
route MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain route. MS removed from optional element.
protocolApplied MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain protocolApplied. MS removed from optional element.
